calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-16-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant and Moving Party Hansel Jones appeared in Propria Persona, (415) 552-3903
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., (415) 863-7100, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party McAllister Street Associates
RULING:
Evidentiary testimony was heard. Helen Denise Pennock and Hansel Jones were sworn in and testified for Defendant. Charles Byrd and Ernesto Molina were sworn in and testified for Plaintiff.

The following exhibit was marked and received into evidence:
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1: Envelope addressed to Tenant(s) in Possession, 260 McAllister Street #204, San Francisco, CA 94102, from Target Legal Support Services

The following exhibit was marked for identification:
Plaintiff's Exhibit 2: 7-page Copy of Prejudgment Claim of Right to Possession, Summons, Complaint and 3-day notice to Hansel Jones

DEFENDANT HANSEL JONES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND: DENIED. Exhibits returned. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
